# kraftwerk

> A modern monorepo boilerplate for scalable projects.

## About

kraftwerk (German: /ˈkʁaftvɛʁk/ — power plant, factory) is a production-ready monorepo boilerplate designed for building scalable applications and packages.

## Tech Stack

- **Turborepo** — Incremental builds, remote caching
- **pnpm** — Fast, disk-efficient package manager
- **TypeScript** — Strict mode, ESM-only
- **Biome** — Unified linting and formatting
- **React 19** — Latest patterns, no forwardRef
- **Tailwind CSS v4** — CSS-first configuration with @theme
- **Vitest** — Fast unit testing
- **Vite** — Next-generation frontend tooling

## Workspace Structure

```
kraftwerk/
├── apps/
│   └── web/              # Example Vite + React app
├── packages/
│   ├── config/           # Shared Biome, TypeScript, Vitest configs
│   └── ui/               # Design system with Storybook
├── docs/                 # Specification and guides
└── .github/              # CI/CD workflows
```

## Quick Start

```bash
git clone https://github.com/w-arantes/kraftwerk.git
cd kraftwerk
pnpm install
pnpm dev
```

## AI Development

This project includes AI-ready tooling:

- **AGENTS.md** — Universal AI agent instructions
- **.github/copilot-instructions.md** — GitHub Copilot instructions
- **.cursor/skills/** — Cursor IDE context-aware skills
